mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO satellite_data ( id, satellite_id, simulation_time, timestamp, position_x, position_y, position_z, orbit_radius, real_pitch, real_roll, real_yaw, battery, solar_efficiency, temperature, thermal_mode, engine_active, is_occluded, is_scanning, pointing_mode, connected_station, speed, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.satelliteId}, #{item.simulationTime}, #{item.timestamp}, #{item.positionX}, #{item.positionY}, #{item.positionZ}, #{item.orbitRadius}, #{item.realPitch}, #{item.realRoll}, #{item.realYaw}, #{item.battery}, #{item.solarEfficiency}, #{item.temperature}, #{item.thermalMode}, #{item.engineActive}, #{item.isOccluded}, #{item.isScanning}, #{item.pointingMode}, #{item.connectedStation}, #{item.speed}, #{item.createdAt} )
